prompt: Write a blog article for the Promptless edu campaign about 'documentation debt'. Research the topic, plan the article, write it, and do an edit pass. Save the final MDX file to the outputs directory. Do NOT create a git branch, PR, or Slack notification -- this is a test run. Just produce the MDX article file.

assertions.name: has_complete_frontmatter
assertions.description: Article has all required frontmatter fields

assertions.name: imports_components
assertions.description: Article imports both required Astro components
